name: fleet-voice-alerts-functions
description: Cloud Functions for Fleet Voice Alerts

scripts.deploy:all: npm run deploy:getConfig && npm run deploy:saveConfig && npm run deploy:saveSession && npm run deploy:getStatus && npm run deploy:getConversation && npm run deploy:testTwilio && npm run deploy:retryCall && npm run deploy:dismissCall && npm run deploy:pollExceptions && npm run deploy:initiateCall && npm run deploy:voiceResponse && npm run deploy:callStatusCallback && npm run deploy:synthesize
scripts.deploy:day1: npm run deploy:getConfig && npm run deploy:saveConfig && npm run deploy:saveSession && npm run deploy:getStatus && npm run deploy:getConversation && npm run deploy:testTwilio && npm run deploy:retryCall && npm run deploy:dismissCall
scripts.deploy:day3: npm run deploy:initiateCall && npm run deploy:voiceResponse && npm run deploy:callStatusCallback && npm run deploy:synthesize
scripts.deploy:getConfig: gcloud functions deploy getConfig          --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point getConfig          --source .
scripts.deploy:saveConfig: gcloud functions deploy saveConfig         --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point saveConfig         --source .
scripts.deploy:saveSession: gcloud functions deploy saveSession        --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point saveSession        --source .
scripts.deploy:getStatus: gcloud functions deploy getStatus          --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point getStatus          --source .
scripts.deploy:getConversation: gcloud functions deploy getConversation    --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point getConversation    --source .
scripts.deploy:testTwilio: gcloud functions deploy testTwilio         --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point testTwilio         --source .
scripts.deploy:retryCall: gcloud functions deploy retryCall          --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point retryCall          --source .
scripts.deploy:dismissCall: gcloud functions deploy dismissCall        --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point dismissCall        --source .
scripts.deploy:pollExceptions: gcloud functions deploy pollExceptions     --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point pollExceptions     --source . --timeout 540s --memory 512MB
scripts.deploy:initiateCall: gcloud functions deploy initiateCall       --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point initiateCall       --source . --timeout 120s
scripts.deploy:voiceResponse: gcloud functions deploy voiceResponse      --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point voiceResponse      --source . --timeout 30s
scripts.deploy:callStatusCallback: gcloud functions deploy callStatusCallback --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point callStatusCallback --source . --timeout 30s
scripts.deploy:synthesize: gcloud functions deploy synthesize         --gen2 --runtime nodejs20 --trigger-http --allow-unauthenticated --entry-point synthesize         --source . --timeout 60s
